title: Add Whole Numbers
essential_question: How do you add multi-digit whole numbers?

hints: Line up the ones. Regroup when a column totals 10 or more.
Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

learn.title: Line Up the Places
learn.content: When you add multi-digit numbers, line them up by place: ones under ones, tens under tens, and so on. This keeps the values of each digit clear.
learn.tts: When you add multi-digit numbers, line them up by place: ones under ones, tens under tens, and so on. This keeps the values of each digit clear.

learn.title: Add Ones First
learn.content: Start adding from the ones place (rightmost). If the sum is 10 or more, regroup: keep the ones digit and carry the tens digit to the next column.
learn.tts: Start adding from the ones place (rightmost). If the sum is 10 or more, regroup: keep the ones digit and carry the tens digit to the next column.

learn.title: Example: 368 + 254
learn.content: Add 8+4=12. Write 2, carry 1. Add 1+6+5=12. Write 2, carry 1. Add 1+3+2=6. Answer: 622.
learn.tts: Add 8+4=12. Write 2, carry 1. Add 1+6+5=12. Write 2, carry 1. Add 1+3+2=6. Answer: 622.

learn.title: Regroup More Than Once
learn.content: You might regroup in more than one column. Work carefully one place at a time, moving left.
learn.tts: You might regroup in more than one column. Work carefully one place at a time, moving left.

learn.title: Add Four-Digit Numbers
learn.content: Use the same steps for 4-digit numbers: 4,567 + 2,895. Ones: 7+5=12 (carry 1). Tens: 1+6+9=16 (carry 1). Hundreds: 1+5+8=14 (carry 1). Thousands: 1+4+2=7. Answer: 7,462.
learn.tts: Use the same steps for 4-digit numbers: 4,567 + 2,895. Ones: 7+5=12 (carry 1). Tens: 1+6+9=16 (carry 1). Hundreds: 1+5+8=14 (carry 1). Thousands: 1+4+2=7. Answer: 7,462.

learn.title: Check Your Answer
learn.content: Estimate to check: 4,567+2,895 ≈ 5,000+3,000 = 8,000. The answer 7,462 is close to 8,000, so it looks right.
learn.tts: Estimate to check: 4,567+2,895 ≈ 5,000+3,000 = 8,000. The answer 7,462 is close to 8,000, so it looks right.
